image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Ever wondered why straws look bent in water?
Context visual: It's not magic; it's physics!
Escalation visual: Light travels at different speeds in air versus water.
Evidence visual: This change in speed causes bending, known as refraction.
Payoff visual: So that quirky bend? Totally explainable!
Cta visual: Curious about more science secrets? Follow for more!
